title: Create City 4 "The New Journey"
description: The 4th Part of the Create City Project
body:
![Wait What?! Part 4?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6d80beb67ba352055450f732cacf64c5a160e8b.png)

------

## What is this project about?

**Create City 4**: The New Journey is the next big step in the annual community series from **[FGS (Friends Community Server)](https://discord.gg/Qn5pWkxvpY)** and [https://discord.gg/ugtdwAg4pm](https://discord.gg/ugtdwAg4pm)
This modpack is powered by the legendary Create mod and its many extensions, such as Create Crafts & Additions, Create Deco, and Create Railways Navigator. You’ll engineer massive factories, design complex transport systems, and breathe life into a city that never sleeps.

But Create is just the beginning — this pack also integrates Timeless and Classics, alongside dozens of carefully chosen mods to enrich performance, realism, and overall gameplay quality.

- **Performance boosts** with mods like Embeddium, FerriteCore, Memory Leak Fix, and No More Reloading Screen for a seamless experience.
- **Realism upgrades** with Physics Remastered, Enhanced Visuals, Immersive Weathering, and Explosion Overhaul.
- **Quality of life** improvements from Mouse Tweaks, Simple Voice Chat, Nature’s Compass, and What Are They Up To.
- **Extra content** including Farmer’s Delight, Alex’s Mobs, WorldEdit, Macaw’s Furniture, and even Superb Vehicles to give your city life.

All of this runs with **built-in anti-cheat measures**, a touch of realism for immersion, and an **updated UI** for a modern, polished feel.

## Features

- 🍲 Enhanced food mechanics – cook, farm, and feast in style
- 💥 Immersive sound effects – explosions, weapons, and ambience reimagined
- ⚡ Improved performance – optimized from the ground up
- 🖥 Refreshed UI – clean, modern, and intuitive
- 🏙 Extensive Create ecosystem – dozens of official & addon mods for limitless engineering
- 🌦 Realism touches – weathering, seasons, physics, and environmental depth
- ✨ And so much more – discover new systems, blocks, and possibilities at every step

## Live Modlist & Updates
We maintain a live Excel table where you can track all mods currently in the pack, along with their update status.
It’s always up to date — so you can instantly see which mods are **newly added**, **updated**, or **under review**.

[View Modlist here](https://1drv.ms/x/c/05dc0df774c7ec0f/ES4j74oEXNZEgVq8CVc0_SUBNrnLTno7sr_V8pcY_CUMoA?e=vYTPpf)
  
## When can we expect it?

We’re still building the world, with the full release and official project launch planned for **Summer 2026**. Until then, dive into the prototypes — tinker, explore, and help shape the journey. The adventure has already begun! (｡•̀ᴗ-)✧
